<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Validation\Constraint; use InvalidArgumentException; use Lcobucci\JWT\Exception; final class CannotValidateARegisteredClaim extends InvalidArgumentException implements Exception { /** @param non-empty-string $claim */ public static function create(string $claim): self { return new self( 'The claim "' . $claim . '" is a registered claim, another constraint must be used to validate its value', ); } }
